items.headline: Regular customer charged in 2025 Davenport vape shop robbery
items.summary: A Davenport man is charged with first-degree robbery after police say he threatened a vape shop employee with a knife during a 2025 robbery.

items.headline: New Iowa law eliminates racial and cultural awareness, bias prevention training requirements. How local police, NAACP respond
items.summary: Some local departments say they're going to continue the trainings, but critics worry the new law sets the state back in terms of criminal justice reform.

items.headline: Illinois man speaks for the first time in 12 years thanks to AI program
items.summary: "We're able to have a working voice that's based on his vocal data,” Cody Pees said. "Him hearing his own voice again was an experience you can’t even imagine.”

items.headline: Iowa State Fair announces over 40 new drinks for 2026

items.headline: Iowa nonprofit adapts to rising costs to keep seniors fed
items.summary: Amid rising costs for gas and food, WesleyLife is adapting operations to maintain sercices for 14,000 Iowa seniors.
